sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3653" key="a)kro/tonos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρό-τονος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n3653.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strained to the utmost, muscular</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Metrod.</author> </bibl> Sceps.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4077.tlg001:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
